security.createUserTable: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (user_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, user_na VARCHAR(50) UNIQUE NOT NULL, user_pw VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, profile_id INT DEFAULT 1, status_id INT DEFAULT 1, person_id INT)
security.getUser: SELECT user_id, user_na, user_pw, profile_id, status_id, person_id FROM users WHERE user_na = $1 AND user_pw = $2
security.insertUser: INSERT INTO users (user_na, user_pw, profile_id, status_id) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4) RETURNING user_id
security.listUsers: SELECT u.user_id, u.user_na, p.profile_na FROM users u INNER JOIN profile p ON p.profile_id = u.profile_id ORDER BY u.user_id ASC

model.createProfile: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS profile (profile_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, profile_na VARCHAR(50) UNIQUE NOT NULL)
model.createSubsystem: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS subsystem (subsystem_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, subsystem_na VARCHAR(50) UNIQUE NOT NULL)
model.createObject: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS object (object_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, object_na VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, subsystem_id INT NOT NULL REFERENCES subsystem(subsystem_id))
model.createMethod: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS method (method_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, method_na VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, object_id INT NOT NULL REFERENCES object(object_id))
model.createOption: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS option (option_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, option_na VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, object_id INT NOT NULL REFERENCES object(object_id))
model.createPermissionMethod: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS permission_method (profile_id INT NOT NULL REFERENCES profile(profile_id), method_id INT NOT NULL REFERENCES method(method_id), PRIMARY KEY (profile_id, method_id))
model.createPermissionOption: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS permission_option (profile_id INT NOT NULL REFERENCES profile(profile_id), option_id INT NOT NULL REFERENCES option(option_id), PRIMARY KEY (profile_id, option_id))
model.createUserProfile: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_profile (user_id INT NOT NULL REFERENCES users(user_id), profile_id INT NOT NULL REFERENCES profile(profile_id), PRIMARY KEY (user_id, profile_id))
model.loadPermissionMethod: SELECT pm.profile_id, m.method_na, o.object_na, s.subsystem_na FROM permission_method pm INNER JOIN method m ON m.method_id = pm.method_id INNER JOIN object o ON o.object_id = m.object_id INNER JOIN subsystem s ON s.subsystem_id = o.subsystem_id
model.loadPermissionOption: SELECT po.profile_id, op.option_na, s.subsystem_na FROM permission_option po INNER JOIN option op ON op.option_id = po.option_id INNER JOIN object o ON o.object_id = op.object_id INNER JOIN subsystem s ON s.subsystem_id = o.subsystem_id
model.insertPermissionMethod: INSERT INTO permission_method (profile_id, method_id) VALUES ($1, $2) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
model.insertPermissionOption: INSERT INTO permission_option (profile_id, option_id) VALUES ($1, $2) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
model.insertUserProfile: INSERT INTO user_profile (user_id, profile_id) VALUES ($1, $2) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
model.seedProfileAdmin: INSERT INTO profile (profile_id, profile_na) VALUES (1, 'Administrador') ON CONFLICT (profile_id) DO NOTHING
model.seedProfileCliente: INSERT INTO profile (profile_id, profile_na) VALUES (2, 'Cliente') ON CONFLICT (profile_id) DO NOTHING
model.seedSubsystemSecurity: INSERT INTO subsystem (subsystem_id, subsystem_na) VALUES (1, 'security') ON CONFLICT (subsystem_id) DO NOTHING
model.seedObjectUser: INSERT INTO object (object_id, object_na, subsystem_id) VALUES (1, 'User', 1) ON CONFLICT (object_id) DO NOTHING
model.seedMethodListUsers: INSERT INTO method (method_id, method_na, object_id) VALUES (1, 'listUsers', 1) ON CONFLICT (method_id) DO NOTHING
model.seedMethodRegister: INSERT INTO method (method_id, method_na, object_id) VALUES (2, 'insertUser', 1) ON CONFLICT (method_id) DO NOTHING
model.seedPermAdminListUsers: INSERT INTO permission_method (profile_id, method_id) VALUES (1, 1) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
model.seedPermAdminRegister: INSERT INTO permission_method (profile_id, method_id) VALUES (1, 2) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
model.seedUserAdmin: INSERT INTO users (user_na, user_pw, profile_id, status_id) VALUES ('admin1', 'Admin123', 1, 1) ON CONFLICT (user_na) DO NOTHING
model.seedUserCliente: INSERT INTO users (user_na, user_pw, profile_id, status_id) VALUES ('cliente1', 'Cliente123', 2, 1) ON CONFLICT (user_na) DO NOTHING
model.seedUserProfile: INSERT INTO user_profile (user_id, profile_id) SELECT user_id, profile_id FROM users ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
